english: Strange activity has been reported in Diessa Plateau.
Strange activity has been reported in Kessex Hills.
Strange creatures are attacking Lion's Arch.

Strange things under the sea. Not just what's frozen in the stone, but the plants, the fungus. Nautus says the nearby wind tunnel exits at a safe location. Even with an elementalist of their caliber, I have doubts. Still, they've been vital for setting up the zip lines.As we continue lower, I sense a growing unease among the crew. Been accused of "staring a little too long" by Odamos and Sintri a couple times. Maybe we should turn back, take our chances walking to the mainland.
